name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and flexible lines of credit secured by vehicle titles, accepting most credit types with quick approval at their Memphis location.
description_long:
TitleMax is an established title lending company with a Memphis presence dating back to February 2007. The Summer Avenue location serves the greater Memphis area and has built a strong customer base over 17+ years of operation. The company specializes in vehicle title-based lending, allowing customers to borrow against the equity in their cars while retaining driving privileges.

The Memphis TN 9 store offers two primary products: Title Pledge loans (secured by vehicle title) and unsecured Flexible Lines of Credit. For title pledges, customers provide a clear vehicle title, valid government ID, and the lender evaluates vehicle value and repayment ability. The unsecured line of credit product requires proof of active banking and income, accepting applications online and in-store. Both products emphasize quick approval and same-day cash availability, with the company accepting most credit types rather than relying solely on credit scores.

The Memphis location distinguishes itself through consistent bilingual service availability, extended weekday hours (7 pm closings Monday and Friday), and a substantial customer review presence with 481+ Google reviews at a 5.0/5 average rating. Individual staff members, particularly Nicole, are specifically highlighted across multiple reviews for professionalism and customer education. The location offers personal interaction and in-person application processing, which some customers may prefer for secured lending decisions.

However, title loans carry inherent risks: if borrowers fail to repay, the lender can repossess the vehicle used as collateral. While the website emphasizes competitive rates and manageable payments, it does not disclose specific APR ranges, origination fees, or late-payment penalties. This is a high-cost emergency borrowing option best suited for borrowers with significant equity in their vehicles, stable income, and full understanding of repossession risk.
address: 2110 N Galloway Ave Suite 111, Mesquite, TX 75150

company_info.headquarters: 2110 N Galloway Ave Suite 111, Mesquite, TX 75150

pros: Same-day cash funding available for approved applications
Accepts most credit types; does not rely solely on credit score
Keep driving your vehicle while using title as collateral
Bilingual service available at this location
Extended hours including 7 pm weekday closings (Mon/Fri)
481+ Google reviews with consistent 5.0/5 average rating
Staff specifically praised for professionalism and customer education (Nicole mentioned in multiple reviews)
Flexible line of credit option provides unsecured alternative to title pledge
cons: No APR ranges, origination fees, or specific rate information disclosed on website
Repossession risk if unable to repay—vehicle can be seized
Title loans are high-cost emergency products; long-term affordability concerns not addressed
Unsecured line of credit has limited state availability (10 states) and online application requires SSN
No information on late payment penalties, prepayment policies, or loan term flexibility
best_for: Vehicle owners with significant equity needing same-day emergency cash
Borrowers with poor or limited credit history who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Consumers who can repay quickly and understand collateral repossession risk
Memphis-area residents preferring in-person loan processing with bilingual support
diagnosis: TitleMax's Memphis location is best for vehicle owners facing urgent financial needs who have clear title to a car with equity and stable repayment ability. The critical caveat is that this is secured lending with repossession risk—borrowers must understand that failure to repay can result in loss of their vehicle, making this suitable only for short-term emergencies and not long-term financial solutions.
services: Flex Line of Credit (unsecured flexible lines of credit)
Payment plan customization based on ability to repay
